# Reproductions

| Target | Reproduction | Type | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| aqsis | [aqsis-renderer-source-build](reproductions/aqsis-renderer-source-build.md) | source-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for turning the public Aqsis source snapshot into a repeatable renderer build and smoke-test track. |
| brender | [brender-critical-edition-source-build](reproductions/brender-critical-edition-source-build.md) | source-build | v132-portable-core-verified-3dmm-pending | The public BRender v1.3.2 portable-core lane is verified through CTest 12/12 at the pinned source snapshot. The separate 3D Movie Maker branch build attempt remains pending, so this reproduction recipe is not complete and its unexecuted 3D Movie Maker build step remains in the sequence. |
| crystal-space | [crystal-space-source-build](reproductions/crystal-space-source-build.md) | source-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding Crystal Space from its public source repository and recording legacy dependency assumptions. |
| lithtech-jupiter | [lithtech-jupiter-user-supplied-build](reproductions/lithtech-jupiter-user-supplied-build.md) | user-supplied-historical-build | planned | Rights-safe reproduction recipe for users who already have a lawful local copy. The public repo records metadata, environment requirements, and build observations only. |
| mesa | [mesa-meson-local-build](reproductions/mesa-meson-local-build.md) | source-build | planned | First Mesa reproduction recipe for turning the public source repository and official build documentation into a repeatable local-build track. |
| ogre | [ogre-source-build](reproductions/ogre-source-build.md) | source-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding OGRE from the public source snapshot and preserving renderer/backend build choices. |
| open-inventor | [open-inventor-source-build](reproductions/open-inventor-source-build.md) | source-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding the public Open Inventor source release and documenting compatibility assumptions from README.FIRST. |
| gool-goal | [opengoal-jak-project-toolchain-build](reproductions/opengoal-jak-project-toolchain-build.md) | clean-room-toolchain-build | planned | Planned clean-room reproduction recipe for building the public OpenGOAL toolchain while keeping game assets and legal-copy validation outside the public repo. |
| phigs | [openphigs-source-build](reproductions/openphigs-source-build.md) | source-reimplementation-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for building OpenPHIGS as a public PHIGS/OpenGL reimplementation while keeping license review visible. |
| pixie | [pixie-renderer-source-build](reproductions/pixie-renderer-source-build.md) | source-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding the public Pixie renderer source mirror and recording renderer-output constraints. |
| ps2-prodg-eb-linux | [ps2sdk-open-source-sdk-build](reproductions/ps2sdk-open-source-sdk-build.md) | open-source-sdk-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for building public PS2SDK as an open-source compatibility lane while keeping ProDG and proprietary Sony material out of the repo. |
| ps1-programmer-tool | [psnoobsdk-clean-room-sdk-build](reproductions/psnoobsdk-clean-room-sdk-build.md) | clean-room-sdk-build | planned | Planned clean-room reproduction recipe for building PSn00bSDK as a public PS1 compatibility lane without redistributing proprietary Programmer's Tool material. |
| quesa | [quesa-source-build](reproductions/quesa-source-build.md) | source-reimplementation-build | planned | Planned reproduction recipe for rebuilding Quesa as a public QuickDraw 3D API compatibility lane. |
